result.stdout:
tdlive
  Telldus Live Console

Usage:
  tdlive [options] [command]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  sensors  Create, read, update and delete sensors
  login    Login to Telldus Live
  logout   Logout to Telldus Live (remove any local secrets)
  devices  Create, read, update and delete devices

commands.payload:
tdlive
  Telldus Live Console

Usage:
  tdlive [options] [command]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  sensors  Create, read, update and delete sensors
  login    Login to Telldus Live
  logout   Logout to Telldus Live (remove any local secrets)
  devices  Create, read, update and delete devices

result.stdout:
devices
  Create, read, update and delete devices

Usage:
  tdlive [options] devices [command]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  bell     Send bell command (method 4) to a device
  command  Send command to device
  down     Send down command (method 128) to device
  info     Get information of specific device
  learn    Send learn command to device
  remove   Remove a device
  stop     Send stop command (method 512) to a device
  on       Turn on a device
  off      Turn off a device
  up       Send up command (method 128) to device
  list     List devices

  bell     Send bell command (method 4) to a device

  down     Send down command (method 128) to device
  info     Get information of specific device
  learn    Send learn command to device
  remove   Remove a device
  stop     Send stop command (method 512) to a device
  on       Turn on a device
  off      Turn off a device
  up       Send up command (method 128) to device
  list     List devices

result.stdout:
command
  Send command to device

Usage:
  tdlive [options] devices command

Options:
  --device-id <device-id>  Device Id [default: ]
  --method <method>        Device method (as number, e.g. 128) [default: 0]
  --value <value>          Command value [default: ]
  -?, -h, --help           Show help and usage information

login
  Login to Telldus Live

Usage:
  tdlive [options] login

Options:
  --publicKey <publicKey>      Public key [default: ]
  --privateKey <privateKey>    Private key [default: ]
  --token <token>              Token [default: ]
  --tokenSecret <tokenSecret>  Token secret [default: ]
  -?, -h, --help               Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
history
  Get sensor history

Usage:
  tdlive [options] sensors history

Options:
  --sensor-id <sensor-id>            Sensor Id [default: ]
  --include-key                      Include key [default: True]
  --include-unit                     Include unit [default: True]
  --human-date                       Include human readable date [default: True]
  --from-timestamp <from-timestamp>  From timestamp [default: 0]
  --to-timestamp <to-timestamp>      To timestamp [default: 0]
  -?, -h, --help                     Show help and usage information
